% Auto-generated PGFPlots figure for schedule_transition_distance_histogram
% Requires: \usepackage{pgfplots,pgfplotstable,xcolor}
% Optional: \usepgfplotslibrary{groupplots}
\providecommand{\postprocessfigurewidth}{\linewidth}
\pgfplotsset{compat=1.18}
\definecolor{CentralMassiveMimoColor}{HTML}{D4A017}
\definecolor{DistributedFixedColor}{HTML}{2F5D8A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableColor}{HTML}{CB3A2A}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptTwoColor}{HTML}{1B9E77}
\definecolor{DistributedMovableOptThreeColor}{HTML}{7570B3}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
    width=\postprocessfigurewidth,
    height=0.62\postprocessfigurewidth,
    xlabel={Relocation distance [m]},
    ylabel={Count},
    grid=major,
    ybar,
    bar width=7pt,
    legend pos=north east,
  ]
    \addplot[draw=DistributedMovableColor, fill=DistributedMovableColor, fill opacity=0.35] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 1)}
    \addplot[draw=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, fill=DistributedMovableOptTwoColor, fill opacity=0.35] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable_optimization_2.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 2)}
    \addplot[draw=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, fill=DistributedMovableOptThreeColor, fill opacity=0.35] table[x=bin_center_m,y=count,col sep=comma] {tikz_data/schedule_histogram_distributed_movable_optimization_3.csv};
    \addlegendentry{Distributed movable (Opt. 3)}
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
